plugins.name: cold-email-generator
plugins.description: Generates and refreshes cold email copy with spintax formatting for instantly.ai campaigns. Supports 4 proven email types: Personalisation-led, Case Study-led, Bullet Point, and Condensed. Pairs with client-brief-generator.

plugins.name: client-brief-generator
plugins.description: Generates a standardized Client Email Draft Doc from a client's website, sales deck, and pitch deck. Produces the canonical brief that cold-email-generator consumes. Uses Apify MCP for website scraping. Supports full generation and section-level refresh.
